title: SSA Document Fetch Report (2026-05-05) — Provenance Log
description: Provenance/run log documenting the 2026-05-05 fetch of SSA documents (Annual Performance Reports, Congressional Justifications, and the extracted DDS budget section). Records which files were saved, extraction status (Firecrawl), the national-only DDS budget-allocation discovery, extraction blockers (Firecrawl credit exhaustion, ssa.gov CDN access denial), and next steps. This is a process/provenance document, not a primary dataset; it carries reusable provenance value for the SSA budget/performance extractions in this repo.
notes: Process-doc, not a primary dataset: this is an internal provenance/run log for the 2026-05-05 SSA document fetch. Carded as reference metadata (tier Computed — internally authored, not an official SSA publication) so the folder is fully described, and related-linked to the extractions it documents. It does retain consumption value (records source PDFs, extraction tool, and the national-only DDS-budget discovery). ORCHESTRATOR NOTE: borderline keep — useful provenance, but ephemeral; safe to drop if the catalog should contain primary datasets only.
